action: Define an auditable verification receipt contract between raw verifier output and the strict evidence-input adapter.

progress.finding: A normalized status is not auditable unless it is tied to the exact verifier, invocation, immutable subject digest, observation time, raw evidence reference, uncertainty, and falsification route.
progress.verification: The committed test artifact was fetched back and inspected; runtime execution remains pending.

limits: The receipt records a verifier result but does not cryptographically verify an artifact or establish that the underlying deployment claim is true.
handoff: Cloudflare Research should emit one receipt per verification check, retain the raw verifier output referenced by evidenceRef, validate all receipts, then feed only their explicit statuses into the R-006 adapter.
